title: erigeron tianschanicus
intro: Erigeron tianschanicus, also known as the Tianschan daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Erigeron tianschanicus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of fever and cough. Erigeron tianschanicus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusions, and dried extracts, although its availability and usage may vary due to limited research and global accessibility.
